name: Player Difficulty Overrides
description: Removes the server and /players command cap of 8 and raises the Offline Difficulty Scaling UI maximum to 65535.

patches.description: Use the requested server difficulty without clamping it to 8
Move the parsed /players value directly into R12D and remove its min/max clamp
Set the primary initialized Offline Difficulty Scaling range to 1 through 65535
patches.bytes: 6A 01 5A 48 8B CF 41 B8 FF FF 00 00 E8 92 A6 CF 00

patches.description: Set the primary fallback Offline Difficulty Scaling maximum to 65535
Set the secondary initialized Offline Difficulty Scaling range to 1 through 65535
Set the secondary fallback Offline Difficulty Scaling maximum to 65535
